About Timber & Testament Custom Carpentry

We are a finish-focused carpentry company serving homeowners across Southeast Tennessee and nearby North Georgia. Our work emphasizes precision layout, durable materials, and detail-rich installation.

What We Build

Built-ins, trim packages, mantels, floating shelves, wall paneling, and interior wood features tailored to each home.

How We Work

Every project follows a clear sequence: consultation, field measurement, scope alignment, installation, and final walkthrough.

Why Homeowners Hire Timber & Testament Custom Carpentry

  • Clear scope, clean job sites, and punch-list accountability.
Call for Quote: 865.200.1604

Timber & Testament Custom Carpentry

Custom finish carpentry and woodworking across Southeast Tennessee.

Service Area

Cleveland TN | Charleston TN | Athens TN | Ooltewah TN | Collegedale TN | Chattanooga TN | Dayton TN | Etowah TN | Sweetwater TN | Calhoun TN | Benton TN | Soddy Daisy TN | Ringgold GA | Fort Oglethorpe GA | Dalton GA
